scripts.dev: concurrently "corepack pnpm dev:shared" "corepack pnpm dev:server" "corepack pnpm dev:client:wait"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server build && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client typecheck
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared lint && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server lint && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client lint
